cases.description: Short ambiguous input that should keep asking follow-up questions.
Basic multi-turn consultation with sleep context and no red flags.
Digestive discomfort with accompanying symptoms and negated red flags.
Low-energy presentation with a concrete chief complaint and no red flags.
Longer deterministic session to exercise state accumulation and report snapshots.
Breathing difficulty red-flag case; validates risk preservation without diagnosis.
Chest pain red-flag case; validates risk preservation without diagnosis.
Report validation case for a longer deterministic multi-turn session.
Low-information report boundary case; report should remain unavailable.
Report boundary case for a severe abdominal pain red flag.
Report safety case with a synthetic secret in user input; report and SQLite must not leak it.
Synthetic secret injection case; validates redaction across API output and SQLite.
